title: Higher Ground

tokens.lyric: I'm pressing on the upward way,

lines.raw: [G]I'm pressing on the upward way,[C]
New heights I'm [G]gaining every day[D7],
Still praying as[G] I'm upw[G7]ard bou[C]nd,
Lord, plant my fe[G]et on hig[D7]her ground[G].

tokens.lyric: Lord, lift me up and let me stan

lines.raw: [G]Lord, lift me up and let me stan[D7]d.

tokens.lyric: By faith on heaven's table lan

lines.raw: By faith on heaven's table lan[G]d,
A higher plan[G7]e than I have foun[C]d;
Lord, plant my feet[G] on higher[D7] ground[G].

tokens.lyric: My heart has no desire to stay

lines.raw: My heart has no desire to stay

tokens.lyric: Where doubts arise and fears dismay,

lines.raw: Where doubts arise and fears dismay,

tokens.lyric: Though some may dwell where these abound,

lines.raw: Though some may dwell where these abound,

tokens.lyric: My prayer, my aim is higher ground.

lines.raw: My prayer, my aim is higher ground.

tokens.lyric: I want to live above the world,

lines.raw: I want to live above the world,

tokens.lyric: Though Satan's darts at me are hurled,

lines.raw: Though Satan's darts at me are hurled,

tokens.lyric: For faith has caught the joyful sound,

lines.raw: For faith has caught the joyful sound,

tokens.lyric: The song of saints on higher ground.

lines.raw: The song of saints on higher ground.

tokens.lyric: I want to scale the utmost height,

lines.raw: I want to scale the utmost height,

tokens.lyric: And catch a gleam of glory bright,

lines.raw: And catch a gleam of glory bright,

tokens.lyric: But still I'll pray till heav'n I've found,

lines.raw: But still I'll pray till heav'n I've found,

tokens.lyric: "Lord, lead me on to higher ground."

lines.raw: "Lord, lead me on to higher ground."
